questions.prompt: How many scored items does the PSI Oregon CCB bulletin allocate to Financial Management?
questions.explanation: The PSI content outline allocates 4 scored items to Financial Management within the Oregon CCB exam blueprint.

questions.prompt: Under ORS 701.068, what may CCB do if paid bond obligations exceed the bond penal sum?
choices: Automatically forgive the excess and keep the license active
Suspend the license and require a higher replacement bond for reinstatement
Replace the bond with only additional insurance
questions.explanation: ORS 701.068 allows CCB to suspend the license when bond-paid obligations exceed the penal sum and to condition reinstatement on a higher bond, potentially up to five times the ordinary amount.

questions.prompt: Which OAR section is the best primary lookup for required insurance certificate content fields for CCB licensing?
questions.explanation: OAR 812-003-0200 is the section that specifies insurance certification and required insurance-certificate content details.
